svg.title: Al-Assisted Service Deviation Workflow — Screen & Role Architecture
svg.desc: Screen inventory, user role map, and approval flow for Telecom/Media operational deviation system
svg.text: INITIATION LAYER — Operations / Account / Network Managers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Screen 1: Dashboard & Deviation Initiation')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Screen 2: Deviation Request Form')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Screen 3: AI Justification Assistant')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Screen 4: Request Review & Policy Check')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Screen 5: Multi-Level Approval Workflow')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Screen 6: Compliance Checklist')

svg.text: EXECUTION & AUDIT LAYER — Post-approval, Finance / Compliance

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Screen 7: Deviation Execution & Notification')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Screen 8: Audit Log & Audit Trail')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Screen 9: Reports & Regulatory Export')

svg.text: ADMIN LAYER — System Admin / Platform Config

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Screen 10: User & Role Management')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Screen 11: Policy & Threshold Config')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Screen 12: AI Model & Prompt Settings')

svg.text: Click any screen to explore it further. Solid arrows = mandatory flow. Dashed = admin support.
